news.headline: Coinbase CFO to speak at Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on Dec 10, 2024, 11:20 pm ET. Watch live on Coinbase Investor Relations website.
news.summary: San Diego-based remote-first company, Coinbase Global, Inc., shared news of their Chief Financial Officer, Alesia Haas, taking part in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on Tuesday, December 10, 2024, at 11:20 pm ET / 8:20 am PT. Interested individuals can access a live webcast and replay of the event on Coinbase’s Investor Relations website at https://investor.coinbase.com. Additionally, disclosures will be made in compliance with filings to the Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: Udemy adds Marylou Maco & Debra Chrapaty to Board of Directors; both experienced leaders. Exciting growth for company.
news.summary: Udemy, a prominent online skills marketplace and learning platform listed on Nasdaq as UDMY, disclosed the addition of Marylou Maco, Avaya's Chief Revenue and Customer Experience Officer, and Debra Chrapaty, Toast's Chief Technology Officer, to its Board of Directors. The Chairman of Udemy’s Board, Sohaib Abbasi, expressed enthusiasm at welcoming the seasoned leaders onboard. Marylou Maco and Debra Chrapaty bring remarkable industry expertise and will play key roles in steering the company's strategic direction.

news.headline: Box Inc. (NYSE: BOX) reports Q3 fiscal 2025 results, ending Oct 31, 2024, with strong financials and new product lineup. CEO Aaron Levie optimistic about future.
news.summary: Box, Inc. disclosed its preliminary financial results for Q3 of fiscal year 2025, concluding on October 31, 2024. The company, listed as NYSE:BOX, a leader in Intelligent Content Management, reported robust performance. CEO Aaron Levie highlighted the introduction of a groundbreaking product lineup. The quarter showcased significant progress, emphasizing the enhanced potential for businesses to maximize their content value, marking a pivotal moment in Box's history.

news.headline: EA's CFO, Stuart Canfield, to present at Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference on Dec 10 in London. Live webcast at http://ir.ea.com.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) revealed that CFO Stuart Canfield is scheduled to speak at the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference in London, England, on December 10. Important information about EA's business and financial performance may be shared during this event. Interested individuals can tune in to the live audio webcast at http://ir.ea.com. The presentation is set for December 10, 2024, at 8:30 AM GMT / 3:30 AM EST and will last 30 minutes.

news.headline: Domo ranked #1 in 2024 Dresner Analytical Platforms Report, 4th consecutive year, top-rated vendor.
news.summary: In Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) revealed its leading position in the 2024 Dresner Advisory Wisdom of Crowds® Analytical Platforms Report. Analytical platforms are comprehensive technology environments catering to various analytical or business intelligence (BI) needs. Domo has been acknowledged as a top vendor in this report for the fourth year in a row. Domo secured the first place in the 2024 Analytica rankings.

news.headline: LucyRx's management services agreement with Citizens Rx adds 100,000 members to its pharmacy benefits portfolio.
news.summary: A company based in Bethesda, Maryland called LucyRx, which is a next-generation pharmacy benefits manager (PBM), has taken over the benefit operations of Citizens Rx. This transition brings in 100,000 new members representing 35 clients who will now fall under the administration of LucyRx.

news.headline: TNT Sports, NBA 2K, and Genius Sports present NBA 2K25 DataCast on truTV & Max for 2024 Emirates NBA Cup, offering unique viewing experiences.
news.summary: TNT Sports is set to broadcast the Knockout Rounds of the 2024 Emirates NBA Cup across its various networks and platforms, providing fans with multiple viewing options on TNT, truTV, and Max. In partnership with NBA 2K and Genius Sports (NYSE:GENI), TNT Sports is dedicated to enhancing the viewing experience for basketball enthusiasts. A unique NBA 2K25 DataCast viewing experience will be available on truTV and Max, showcasing the network's commitment to innovation during key basketball events.

news.headline: Latitude Margaritaville Watersound in Panama City Beach sells its 2000th home with plans for 3500 total, opened in May 2021.
news.summary: In Panama City Beach, Florida, Minto Communities USA, The St. Joe Company, and Margaritaville Holdings have revealed that Latitude Margaritaville Watersound has reached a milestone by selling its 2,000th home. The community, catering to active adults aged 55 and above, was launched in May 2021. The initial phase of the project aims to include around 3,500 homes, with potential for further phases in the future. Latitude Margaritaville Watersound is rapidly growing and becoming a popular choice among retirees seeking a vibrant community.

news.headline: Intuitive Machines is launching a public offering of $65 million of its Class A common stock, with a potential additional $9.75 million, subject to market conditions.
news.summary: Houston-based Intuitive Machines, Inc. (Nasdaq: LUNR, LUNRW) has initiated an underwritten public offering of $65.0 million in Class A common stock. The company, a prominent player in space exploration, infrastructure, and services, along with a selling stockholder, plans to offer the underwriters a 30-day option to secure up to an additional $8,872,500 and $877,500 in shares of Class A Common Stock from each party. The completion of the Offering is dependent on market conditions, and there is no guarantee on the final size or terms of the Offering.

news.headline: MachTen, Inc. reported Q3 2024 financial results with operating revenue at $4.3M, net income $1.7M, and EBITDA $2.5M. Subsidiaries invest in fiber network expansion and expect growth in subscribers. Company navigating funding challenges for broadband infrastructure.
news.summary: MachTen, Inc. reported its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. Operating revenue was $4,307, up from $4,131 the previous year; operating income was $1,864 compared to $1,553; net income was $1,667 vs. $1,082; and earnings per share were $0.52, up from $0.34. The company's EBITDA for the quarter was $2.5 million, increasing from $2.1 million in the previous year, and for the first nine months of 2024 it was $6.8 million, up from $5.8 million in 2023. Michigan Broadband, a subsidiary, has been increasing its fiber-optic network, with 100 miles constructed in the last year. The company is working to expand its services and subscriber base, with plans to offer at least 100 Mbps/20 Mbps data service to more than 20,000 locations. They had 1,450 fiber-based Internet subscribers as of September 30, 2024. MachTen's balance sheet showed $1.3 million in cash and cash equivalents as of September 30, 2024. The company also executed a $20 million term loan to help finance its capex obligations. MachTen is a holding company for various broadband and communication service providers.

news.headline: Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) beats Q3 earnings estimates by 16%, reporting EPS of $0.67 versus estimated $0.58.
news.summary: On Tuesday, December 3, 2024, Okta (NASDAQ: OKTA) announced its Q3 earnings, surpassing estimated earnings by 16.0%. The company reported an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.67, exceeding the expected $0.58. Okta released its earnings at 04:01 PM. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Salesforce's Q3 earnings fell short by -1.0%, revealing an EPS of $2.41 vs estimates. Visit Benzinga.com for details.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) disclosed its Q3 earnings, releasing the results at 04:01 PM. Despite expectations, the company fell short on earnings by -1.0%, posting an EPS of $2.41. For further details on this announcement, refer to the complete report on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Pure Storage announces Q3 fiscal 2025 results, including industry-first design win from a top-four hyperscaler.
news.summary: Pure Storage, a leading IT company based in Santa Clara, California, secured a significant design win from one of the top-four hyperscalers on December 3, 2024. The company, listed on the NYSE under the symbol PSTG, specializes in providing cutting-edge data storage technologies and services. This success in the industry comes as the company revealed its financial performance for the third quarter.

news.headline: Marvell Technology reports Q3 net revenue of $1.516B, 7% YoY growth; GAAP gross margin 23.0%; GAAP dil loss per share $(0.78).
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, a tech company based in Santa Clara, California reported a net revenue of $1.516 billion, marking a 7% increase from the previous year. The gross margin for the quarter was reported at 23.0% based on GAAP, and 60.5% on a non-GAAP basis. The diluted income (loss) per share for the quarter was $(0.78) on a GAAP basis, and $0.43 on a non-GAAP basis.

news.headline: Positive results from abuse potential study of Oral Nalbuphine vs. butorphanol; lower "Drug Liking" at 81mg and 162mg doses vs. butorphanol. Conference call/webcast at 5:00 p.m. ET today. Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: Trevi Therapeutics, Inc. will be hosting a conference call and webcast today at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss their recent findings. According to a recent study, there was a notable decrease in the "Drug Liking" for the 81mg and 162mg doses of oral nalbuphine compared to butorphanol across the clinical dose range. This difference was found to be statistically significant. The results of this study can have important implications for the future use of these medications.

This move signifies the company's active engagement with the investment community, showcasing its commitment to transparency and stakeholder communication.

news.headline: PennantPark Investment Corp. (NYSE: PNNT) declares $0.08 per share monthly distribution, payable on Jan 2, 2025 to stockholders.
news.summary: In Miami, on December 3, 2024, PennantPark Investment Corporation, listed on NYSE as PNNT, announced a monthly distribution of $0.08 per share for December 2024. This distribution will be paid on January 2, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 16, 2024. The payment is anticipated to come from taxable net investment income. Further details on the tax implications of the distribution will be provided to shareholders via Form 1099 at the conclusion of the calendar year and in the Company's periodic report submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: SPS Commerce (NASDAQ: SPSC) to present at Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference on December 10, 2024, at 3:00 PM GMT.
news.summary: SPS Commerce, Inc., a prominent player in retail supply chain cloud services listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SPSC, is scheduled to participate in the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference. The event is set to take place on Tuesday, December 10, 2024, at 3:00 PM Greenwich Mean Time. Management from SPS Commerce, Inc. will be presenting at this conference.

news.summary: On December 3, 2024, LPL Financial LLC revealed that Rich Steinmeier, the CEO, alongside Matt Audette, the President and CFO, will be participating in the Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on December 10.

news.summary: On December 3, 2024, TTM Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTMI), a key global technology solutions manufacturer, shared its participation in the 2024 International Electronics Circuit Exhibition (Shenzhen) in China. news.headline: XPO reports LTL data for November 2024: daily tonnage down 4.0%, shipments down 4.2%, weight per shipment up 0.2%.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Conn., on Dec. 03, 2024, XPO, a prominent North American freight transportation provider, revealed preliminary LTL segment operating figures for November 2024. LTL tonnage per day dropped by 4.0% compared to November 2023 due to a 4.2% decline in shipments per day and a 0.2% rise in weight per shipment. It is important to note that actual results for November 2024 may differ from the initial data highlighted above.

news.headline: PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. declares $0.1025 distribution per share for December 2024, payable on January 2, 2025.
news.summary: Miami, December 03, 2024 - PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. announced its monthly distribution for December 2024 at $0.1025 per share. Shareholders of record as of December 16, 2024, will receive this payment on January 2, 2025. The distribution, sourced from taxable net investment income, will have final tax details shared with stockholders via Form 1099 post the calendar year's end and in the Company's SEC filed periodic report.

news.headline: Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) reported first-quarter fiscal 2025 results, CEO Mark Clouse reaffirms full-year guidance.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the Campbell's Company (NASDAQ: CPB) recently disclosed their first-quarter fiscal 2025 results, ending on October 27, 2024. CEO Mark Clouse commented on the outcomes, stating that the company's performance for the quarter met their anticipated targets. Despite challenges posed by the shifting consumer landscape and varying category recoveries, Campbell's remains adaptable. They are strategically managing investments and profits to uphold their commitments for both the present year and the future.

news.headline: Internal Healthcare Group launches free platform connecting families to quality caregivers and providers globally from Jan 4, 2025.
news.summary: A significant development in senior care is underway as Internal Healthcare Group will introduce its innovative nationwide platform on January 4, 2025, in Tampa, Florida. This groundbreaking platform is set to transform senior care services for families in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. By streamlining care services, the platform will provide essential support to families across these regions.

news.headline: Sprouts Farmers Market to present at Nasdaq Investor Conference in London, CEO & CFO to discuss at 9:30 a.m EDT/2:30 p.m GMT.
news.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (Nasdaq: SFM) has disclosed its involvement in the Nasdaq 51st Annual Investor Conference in London. The company, known for being a major specialty retailer of fresh, natural, and organic food in the United States, will have its chief executive officer, Jack Sinclair, and chief financial officer, Curtis Valentine, engage in a fireside chat discussion. The chat is scheduled to take place at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time/2:30 p.m. Greenwich Mean Time on December [date].

news.headline: Torrid's Q3 fiscal 2024 results disappoint, CEO Lisa Harper reports due to lack of new products.
news.summary: In City of Industry, California, Torrid Holdings Inc., a leading direct-to-consumer brand on the NYSE under CURV, catering to women in sizes 10 to 30, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on November 2, 2024. Lisa Harper, Torrid's CEO, expressed disappointment in the results, citing a lack of innovation in their fall collections as a contributing factor. The company's third-quarter results failed to meet projections, suggesting a need for strategic adjustments in product offerings and market responsiveness.

news.headline: Qurate Retail, Inc. moves equity listing to Nasdaq Capital Market from the New York Stock Exchange.
news.summary: ENGLEWOOD, Colorado - Qurate Retail, Inc. has decided to switch its equity listing to the Nasdaq Capital Market. The move comes as part of the company's strategic decisions in the market. This change will involve transferring the listing of the company's equity from its current exchange to Nasdaq. Nasdaq Capital Market is known for catering to companies with smaller market capitalization levels. Qurate Retail, Inc. made this decision to align its listing with the platform that better fits its current needs and objectives.

news.headline: Poland's GDP expected to grow 3.7% in 2025, outperforming EU and Germany. NextGen EU funds contributing to recovery.
news.summary: Poland's GDP is projected to grow by 3.7% in 2025, making it the fastest-growing economy in the EU. This growth is supported by strong private consumption and investments. In 2024, the country experienced a rebound from 0.2% to just over 3%, driven by a strong financial sector and significant wage growth leading to increased consumer spending. Poland's economic success has been praised by the IMF and it outperforms both the EU and Germany, with the EU GDP expected to grow by 0.8% this year and German GDP contracting by 0.1% in 2024. The country's GDP growth is being driven by a consumption-led recovery and investments from NextGen EU funds, aimed at aiding economic recovery post-COVID-19. Poland recorded the EU's largest GDP growth in the second quarter of 2024 at +1.5%.

news.headline: Macron confident in French government's ability to withstand no-confidence vote.
Inotiv announces fiscal 2024 Q4 and full-year financial results, along with business update.
Israeli Ministry of Health approves Beyond Cancer to conduct Phase 1b trial of LV UNO with anti-PD-1 therapy in Israel. Trial to start in Q1 2025 at four sites.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on December 3, 2024, Beyond Cancer, Ltd., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, disclosed that the Israeli Ministry of Health (IMOH) has granted approval for the utilization of Low Volume UNO (LV UNO) in a Phase 1b clinical trial. The trial will examine LV UNO in conjunction with anti-PD-1 therapy for solid tumors. It will take place at four locations in Israel, with patient recruitment commencing in Q1 of 2025.

news.headline: Pool Corporation's CFO to join Nasdaq 51st Investor Conf in London on Dec 10, 2024 with Morgan Stanley, for meetings & chat.
news.summary: In Covington, Louisiana, on December 3, 2024, Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) disclosed that Melanie M. Hart, the Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to partake in the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference in London, UK, on December 10, 2024. The event, associated with Morgan Stanley, will include investor sessions and a fireside chat with significant stakeholders.

news.headline: Bionomics to present at ACNP Annual Meeting in Phoenix on ATTUNE trial results for BNC210 in PTSD, Dec 8-11.
news.summary: Bionomics Limited (Nasdaq: BNOX), a biotech company from Adelaide, Australia and Cambridge, Mass., will present Phase 2 ATTUNE trial results of BNC210 for post-traumatic stress disorder at the 63ʳᵈ Annual Meeting of ACNP in Phoenix, AZ on Dec. 8-11, 2024. The company focuses on developing allosteric ion channel modulators for CNS disorders. The presentation will be in the "Promising Targets" session at the event.

news.headline: X4 Pharmaceuticals issued 396,824 shares of common stock as inducement awards to new employees on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: X4 Pharmaceuticals recently disclosed that on December 2, 2024, they granted inducement awards to new employees under the 2019 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. This plan is specifically for issuing equity awards to individuals not previously employed by X4. The inducement awards included options to buy a total of 396,824 shares of X4's common stock. These awards were provided as an enticement for new employees joining X4 and were sanctioned by the company's Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors in agreement with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: NeuroPace finishes enrollment in feasibility study of RNS System for Lennox-Gastaut Syndrome - a severe childhood epilepsy.
news.summary: A study funded by the NIH has finished enrolling participants and conducting implant procedures for individuals with Lennox-Gastaut Syndrome (LGS), a serious form of childhood-onset epilepsy. This feasibility study aimed to assess the effectiveness of implants in managing LGS. The study involved enrolling [number] participants and performing implant procedures on [number] individuals. LGS is recognized for its severe and disabling impact on those diagnosed at a young age.

news.headline: Latham Group to participate in Wolfe December Conference on Dec 10; CEO & CFO to host investor meetings.
news.summary: In Latham, New York, on December 3, 2024, Latham Group, Inc., the leading designer, producer, and seller of in-ground residential pools across North America, Australia, and New Zealand, shared plans for investor meetings. Scott Rajeski, the President and CEO, and Oliver Gloe, the CFO, will be conducting these meetings during the Wolfe December Small Group/1x1 Conference on December 10. The event will take place online.

news.headline: Intuit CEO to present at Nasdaq Investor Conference on Dec 10, 2024 at 5:00 a.m. PT, Nasdaq: INTU. Watch live at Intuit's investor relations website.
news.summary: Intuit Inc., a leading global financial technology platform with popular products such as Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, disclosed that its CEO, Sasan Goodarzi, is scheduled to speak at the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference on December 10, 2024. news.headline: Affirm CFO Rob O'Hare to participate in fireside chat on Dec 13, 2024 with Deutsche Bank moderator. Webcast at 11 AM ET.
news.summary: SAN FRANCISCO -- Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) has reported that Rob O’Hare, the company's CFO, is scheduled to partake in a shareholder fireside chat on December 13, 2024. news.headline: Intuit's Marianna Tessel to present at Barclays conference on December 11, 2024. fireside chat at 1:20 p.m. PT (4:20 p.m. ET). #INTU
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU) disclosed that Marianna Tessel, the executive vice president and general manager of Intuit’s Global Business Solutions Group, will be speaking at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on December 11, 2024. news.headline: Company releases Q3 fiscal year 2025 results.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that approximately 10,000 jobs will be created in the upcoming fiscal year due to a new government initiative aimed at boosting the economy. The initiative includes investing $50 million in various sectors, such as technology and infrastructure. This is part of a larger effort to stimulate economic growth and reduce unemployment rates, which currently stand at 8.5%. The government hopes that these measures will lead to a 2% increase in GDP by the end of the fiscal year. Additionally, there are plans to provide training programs for workers to acquire new skills and enhance their employability in the rapidly changing job market. This comprehensive strategy is expected to have a positive impact on the overall economic outlook and well-being of the population.

news.headline: VTEX customers generated $0.9 billion in sales during Black Friday-Cyber Monday, with 21% increase in orders and 19% growth in GMV.
news.summary: VTEX, a leading commerce platform for top brands and retailers, disclosed that its clients achieved a GMV of $0.9 billion during the Black Friday-Cyber Monday week*. This marks a notable growth compared to the previous year, with orders rising by 21% and GMV increasing by 19% in FX-neutral terms and 1% in USD. The figures were impacted by foreign exchange fluctuations. The successful week saw activity across 43 countries where VTEX operates, with Electronics, Home, and Furniture sectors emerging as the top-performing verticals.

news.headline: Okta announces third quarter fiscal year 2025 results, reporting strong profitability and cash flow. CEO Todd McKinnon pleased with investments made.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Okta, Inc. (Nasdaq: OKTA), a prominent independent Identity partner, disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on October 31, 2024. Todd McKinnon, Okta's Chief Executive Officer and co-founder, expressed satisfaction with the solid Q3 results characterized by robust profitability and cash flow. McKinnon emphasized the positive impact of strategic investments in the partner ecosystem, public sector vertical, and large clients, all contributing to the company's success.

news.headline: Trump transition team says it enters MOU with US Justice Department.
